title: Sentinel (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:NightsisterSentinel-AoD.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] sentinel]]
'''Sentinel''' refers to various items:

==Canon==

===Characters===

*'''[[Sentinel]]''', an [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[stormtrooper]]

===Droids===
*'''[[Corvax Sentinel]]s''', droids which guarded [[Lord Corvax's tomb]]
*'''[[Droideka Sentinel]]s'''
*'''[[IG-86 sentinel droid]]s'''
*'''[[Sentinel (Contingency)|Sentinels]]''', [[droid]] messengers of [[Emperor]] [[Darth Sidious|Palpatine]] after his [[Battle of Endor|death]] as part of his [[Contingency]]

===Locations===
*The '''[[Final Protector]]''', also known as the '''Sentinel''', a [[Jedi]] statue on the [[moon]] [[Jedha]]
*'''[[Sentinel Base]]''', a military base commanded by [[Wilhuff Tarkin]]
*The '''[[Sentinel moon]]''', a [[moon]] which housed Sentinel Base
*The '''''[[Sentinel Flare]]''''', a [[FireStar II-class Orbital Defense Platform|''FireStar II''-class Orbital Defense Platform]]
*'''[[Sentinel One]]''', a [[mining]] [[planet]] utilized by [[Skakoan]]s as a [[Unidentified Skakoan listening station|listening station]]
===Vehicles===
*The '''[[SCS-19 Sentinel armored landspeeder]]'''
*The '''[[Sentinel (Acclamator-class)|''Sentinel'']]''', an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship|''Acclamator''-class transgalactic military assault ship]]
*'''[[Sentinel-class landing craft|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]]'''

===Organizations===
*The '''[[87th Sentinel Corps]]'''
*'''[[Jedi Sentinel]]s'''
*'''[[Pyke sentinel]]s'''

==Legends==
===Droids===
*'''[[IG-86 sentinel droid/Legends|IG-86 sentinel droids]]'''
*'''[[Kaon Sentinel Mk. III]]'''
*'''[[OT-9 Sentinel Droid]]s'''
*'''[[Prototype Rk-4 Sentinel]]'''
*'''[[Sentinel droid]]s'''

===Locations===

*'''[[Sentinel (Golan defense platform)|''Sentinel'']]''', a [[Golan space defense platform]]
*'''[[Sentinel (Deep Space Manufacturing Facility)|''Sentinel'']]''', a [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility]]

===Organizations===
*'''[[Aurilia sentinel]]s'''
*'''[[Imperial Senate Sentinel]]s'''
*'''[[Imperial Sentinel]]s'''
*'''[[Jedi Sentinel/Legends|Jedi Sentinels]]'''
*'''[[Magus Sentinel]]s'''
*'''[[Sentinel Squad]]''', a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] unit
*'''[[Surnack's Sentinel 100]]'''

===Vehicles===
*The '''[[Sentinel (Acclamator-class)/Legends|''Sentinel'']]''', an [[Acclamator-class assault ship|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]]
*The '''[[Sentinel (Bakura-class)|''Sentinel'']]''', a [[Bakura-class destroyer|''Bakura''-class destroyer]]
*The '''[[Sentinel (Interdictor cruiser)|''Sentinel'']]''', an [[Interdiction field/Legends|Interdictor cruiser]]
*The '''[[Sentinel (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Sentinel'']]''', an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]]
*The '''[[Sentinel (Victory-class)|''Sentinel'']]''', a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]]
*'''[[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]]'''
*The '''''[[Stellar Sentinel]]''''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]]
*'''[[TIE Sentinel]]s'''
*The '''[[SCS-19 Sentinel/Legends|SCS-19 Sentinel]]''', a [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]]
*The '''[[Sentinel (Wookiees)|Sentinel]]''', a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]]

===Others===
*'''[[Sentinel (creature)|Sentinel]]''', the "Guardian of Forever"
*'''[[Sentinel (hilt)|Sentinel]]''', a [[Lightsaber hilt/Legends|lightsaber hilt]]
*'''[[Sentinel beetle]]s'''
*The '''[[Sentinel IV heavy blaster pistol]]'''
*'''[[Sentinel Outpost]]''', a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] military base

==Real world==
*'''''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Sentinel]]''''', an Legends eBook by [[John Jackson Miller]]
